hero.headline: Your money, finally clear.
hero.sub: Join the people who choose Dali to manage their finances every day.

appCard.title: The Dali mobile app
appCard.desc: Manage your accounts and optimize your spending and savings every day.

bizCard.title: Our business solutions

app.title: Your finances, finally clear
app.sub: Accounts, spending, savings and advice: Dali brings your whole financial life into one clear, free app.

overview.title: Every account, one view
overview.body: Connect all your banks and track your total balance in real time. No more jumping between apps — your money, all in one place.

assistant.title: An assistant that advises you
assistant.body: Dali's AI assistant answers your questions and guides you with clear, personalized advice grounded in your real data.

score.title: Your Dali-Score, from 0 to 1000
score.body: A simple indicator of your financial health that grows with your good habits and shows you exactly how to improve.

budget.title: Budgets that hold
budget.body: Set budgets by category, track your savings goals and watch your progress month after month, effortlessly.

cta.title: Ready to see clearly?
cta.body: Download Dali for free and take control of your finances today.

virement.title: Your Mobile Money transfers, prepared in one tap
virement.sub: Start an MTN MoMo or Orange Money payment from Dali: the app fills in the USSD code for you, ready to send. Dali never touches your money.

prepare.title: The right code, pre-filled
prepare.body: Pick the recipient and amount: Dali prepares the exact USSD code (*126*1*…), with no typing errors.

dialer.title: One tap and you're set
dialer.body: Dali opens your phone dialer with the code already entered — just confirm with your operator PIN.

track.title: Automatic tracking
track.body: When the transaction comes back by SMS, Dali detects it and sorts it into the right category, with no manual entry.

cta.title: Pay faster, error-free
cta.body: Download Dali and prepare your MoMo and Orange Money transfers in seconds.

echeancier.title: Your savings goals and building projects
echeancier.sub: Set money aside for what matters — school fees, loan repayment, travel — and track your building projects from the first stone to the last contribution.

goals.title: Goals that fit you
goals.body: Education, travel, repayment or a free-form project: set an amount, a deadline, and let Dali work out the pace.

chantier.title: Track your building projects
chantier.body: Construction, renovation: follow the money you put in and watch your project reach "X% built" as contributions add up.

simulate.title: Adjust the pace
simulate.body: Simulate a monthly contribution and instantly see when you'll reach your goal.

cta.title: Build your projects, month after month
cta.body: Download Dali and give your savings a direction.

aggregation.title: Every account, one view
aggregation.sub: Bring your MTN MoMo, Orange Money and bank accounts together into a single, synchronized view. Coming soon to Dali.

sources.title: All your sources together
sources.body: MoMo, Orange Money, bank: connect each source and track your total balance at a glance.

sync.title: Continuously synced
sync.body: Your balances and transactions update automatically, with no re-entry.

clarity.title: A clear view
clarity.body: No more jumping between apps — your money, all in one place.

cta.title: Soon: all your accounts together
cta.body: Download Dali to be ready the moment multi-account aggregation opens.

wealth.title: Your wealth, at a glance
wealth.sub: Accounts, savings, investments, real estate, tontines: track the total value of what you own, revalued anytime.

total.title: Your total wealth
total.body: Add up every asset — cash, investments, property, tontine — for a clear picture of your net worth.

assets.title: Every asset at its true value
assets.body: Add land, a BVMAC/OPCVM investment, crypto or a tontine share, with supporting documents, and revalue it whenever you want.

track.title: Follow the trend
track.body: Visualize your wealth's progress over several months and stay on course.

cta.title: Steer your wealth
cta.body: Download Dali and keep a complete view of what you own.

insights.title: Insights that move you forward
insights.sub: Dali analyzes your spending and habits to deliver clear, personalized observations grounded in your real data.

observe.title: What your spending reveals
observe.body: Dali spots trends in your spending and explains them simply, month after month.

personal.title: Personalized, never generic
personal.body: Every observation starts from your real transactions — no canned advice.

act.title: Take action
act.body: Concrete suggestions to save more and avoid bad surprises.

cta.title: Understand your money
cta.body: Download Dali and let your data work for you.

etudes.title: Our studies
etudes.sub: Coming soon: our analysis of financial trends and behavior, to inform your decisions.

trends.title: Consumption trends
trends.body: Decode how spending, saving and financial habits evolve.

exclusive.title: Exclusive analysis
exclusive.body: Original studies drawn from real, aggregated and anonymized data.

decisions.title: To guide your decisions
decisions.body: Concrete insights to steer your choices.

cta.title: Coming soon
cta.body: Stay tuned: our first studies are on the way.

showcase.title: Install Dali in one scan
showcase.sub: Scan the code with your phone, or download from your store.
showcase.qrAlt: QR code to download the Dali app
showcase.gridTitle: Your best financial decisions, every day
showcase.scan: Scan this QR code to download the app for free and manage your accounts, budgets, and savings with ease.

aggregation.title: All your accounts in one place
aggregation.body: Bring every account together, whatever your bank, in one clear and practical interface.

sms.title: Track every franc spent
sms.body: Each expense is captured and sorted automatically so you see clearly and save more.

ai.title: An assistant that advises you
ai.body: Clear, personalized advice grounded in your real data.

score.title: Your Dali-Score
score.body: A 0–1000 score that sums up your financial health and grows with you.

pay.title: Pay and get paid in a tap
pay.body: A QR code, a scan, and it's done — between friends or for a pro payment.

budget.title: Analyze your budget
budget.body: A clear overview of your spending and income, sorted by category.

sms.title: Automatic tracking
sms.body: Your transactions captured and sorted, no manual entry.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.body: Clear advice grounded in your real data.

sync.title: Multi-account
sync.body: All your accounts together and in sync.

aggregation.title: All your accounts, together
aggregation.body: Bring every account into one place, whatever your bank, and keep a clear overview.

sms.title: Automatic SMS tracking
sms.body: Every transaction is captured and categorized automatically — no manual entry at all.

ai.title: A financial advisor in your pocket
ai.body: Ask questions and get clear, personalized advice grounded in your real data.
ai.sample: You spent 32% less on dining this month. Keep it up!

score.title: Your Dali-Score
score.body: A 0–1000 score that sums up your financial health and grows with good habits.

budgets.title: Budgets and goals
budgets.body: Set budgets, track savings goals, and see your progress at a glance.

business.title: Dali technology for your business
business.intro: Harness the power of financial data with our access, payment, and enrichment solutions. An Open Banking suite to boost your performance.

payments.title: Optimize your payments, accelerate your growth

data.title: Bring intelligence to your financial data

auto.title: 100% automatic tracking
auto.body: Your transactions captured and categorized with no manual entry.

secure.title: Secure by design
secure.body: Your financial data is encrypted and protected end to end.

offline.title: Offline first
offline.body: Everything works without a connection; your data stays on your device.

personas.title: Open Finance solutions for everyone
personas.sub: Whatever your profile, Dali brings clarity to your money.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.body: Track your day-to-day spending and stay in control of your budget effortlessly.

students.title: Students
students.body: Tight budget? Dali helps you track every cent and avoid nasty surprises.

families.title: Families
families.body: Bring the household's accounts together and manage shared spending with clarity.

professionals.title: Professionals
professionals.body: Separate business and personal, track your flows, and anticipate due dates.

ecommerce.title: E-merchants
ecommerce.body: Keep an eye on your income and the financial health of your business.

b2b.title: Dali for business
b2b.sub: Financial solutions for professionals and institutions — coming soon.

data.title: Data & API
data.body: Bank aggregation and APIs for your financial products.

insights.title: Insights
insights.body: Real-time analysis of your financial flows.

security.title: Your data belongs to you
security.body: Encryption, offline operation, and full sovereignty over your financial information.

free.title: Free to start
free.body: Download Dali and take control of your finances, at no cost.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Dali.

cost.a: Yes, Dali is free to start and track your finances.

offline.a: Yes. Dali is offline-first: everything works without a connection and syncs afterwards.

sms.a: Dali reads your bank's transaction SMS to categorize your spending automatically.

privacy.a: Your data is encrypted and you keep full control of it.

score.a: A 0–1000 score summarizing your financial health.

accounts.a: Yes, bring all your accounts together and track them in one place.

features.title: Everything Dali does for you
features.body: A full overview of the features that help you master your money.

security.title: Security & privacy
security.body: How Dali protects your financial data.
security.s1body: Your sensitive data is encrypted end to end.
security.s2body: Dali works without a connection; your data stays on your device and syncs when you choose.
security.s3body: You keep full control: export or delete your data anytime.

about.title: Our mission
about.body: Make financial clarity accessible to everyone. Dali was born from the belief that managing money should be simple, smart, and privacy-respecting.

enterprise.title: Dali for business
enterprise.body: Financial solutions for professionals and institutions. These offerings are coming soon — get in touch to learn more.

meta.homeDesc: Multi-account aggregation, automatic tracking, AI advice, and full control of your money, even offline.

legal.notice: Draft document — to be reviewed by a lawyer before production.

conditions.title: Terms of use
conditions.body: By using Dali, you accept these terms of use. This draft describes service access, user responsibilities, and liability limitations. It will be replaced by the legally reviewed final version.

confidentialite.title: Privacy policy
confidentialite.body: Dali respects your privacy. This draft describes the data collected, its use, retention, and your rights. Your financial data is encrypted and you keep control of it. The final version will be legally reviewed.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.body: This site uses a minimum of cookies necessary for it to function. This draft describes the cookies used and how to manage them. The final version will be legally reviewed.

footer.description: Building Open Banking and Open Finance experiences. Dali brings all your accounts together and brings clarity to your money.
